goal: Introduce file source auto organization through generated virtual baseline structure, incoming folder processing, usage-driven organization proposals, safe managed_fs physical transfers and future S3-compatible storage readiness.
global_constraints: Use ADR-0025 as the implementation baseline after owner approval.
Do not treat relative_path as stable file identity in auto organization flows.
Do not physically move files before an approved organization proposal.
Do not delete source files before copy verification, metadata commit, retention and backup checkpoint.
Keep virtual views separate from access policy; user virtual paths do not grant access.
Keep personal structure statistics aggregated and safe; do not expose raw personal folder names or raw queries in shared proposals.
Fail closed on unresolved ACL, sensitivity or secret issues.
Keep S3-compatible storage as a future backend; MVP starts with managed_fs.
Host-specific paths and secrets must stay in runtime contracts or deployment silos.
Keep temporary corpora, move manifests, logs and e2e artifacts under .local/ or data/.
